sys_script_include.description:
2.8.1 | 2023-04-07 | raj | DFCT0011736 - "List / form bifold view" name & icon should NOT display on the task form 2.8.1 | 2023-03-11 | raj | STRY0135701 - Subtask; Detailed Status; Action Log; and Final Response tabs - on many pages 2.8 | 2022-07-28 | raj | STRY0126152 - Task Form Layouts- User Preferences when selecting layout 2.8 | 2022-07-14 | raj | STRY0125255 - Template Layout- Add "Template List Page" as an option 2.8 | 2022-06-26 | raj | STRY0123993 - Template Layouts- "Layout Selector" will NOT be displayed on "Template List page" NOTE: this story was changed again and overridden before 2.8 shipped
2.8 | 2022-06-24 | raj | DFCT0010998 - "Template List" drop down is NOT displayed to the following roles: "Personal Template Designer", "Task Manager" & etc
2.8 | 2022-05-19 | raj | DFCT0010910 - Task Form Page Layout is NOT displaying "Task Requests" in the Layout selector on the Existing Task Form View" to the "Tasker user" role/non platform admin 2.8 | 2022-05-19 | raj | DFCT0010913 - Task Form Page Layout is NOT displaying "Task Activity " in the Layout selector on the Existing Task Form View" for the "Tasker user" role
2.8 | 2022-05-15 | raj | STRY0118963 - Homepage to Org Hierarchy- System remembers user in Bifold/Fullscreen/Table/List 2.8 | 2022-03-29 | raj | STRY0119587 - Task Form Page Layout- Layout: Requests - Initial Tasker Tabs widget
This script include provides the menus for Tasker pages
sys_script_include.name: TaskerPageMenus
